strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise with production-scale deployments across multiple senior roles
Broad fullstack coverage including REST APIs, web architecture, cloud (AWS CDK), and Kubernetes — well above role requirements
Current AI/LLM agent and MCP tooling experience aligns with the nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Significantly overqualified at Staff/Senior level with 15+ years of experience; Junior/Mid positioning creates a compensation and retention mismatch risk
Located in Lagos, Nigeria — the role demands high on-site presence, raising immediate logistics and relocation feasibility questions
No explicit React or NestJS experience on the resume (Ember.js is the recurring frontend framework); PostgreSQL also absent, replaced by MongoDB and MySQL
response.justification: Bogdan brings a genuinely strong and varied technical background — TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, AI tooling, and a long track record of shipping production systems — that comfortably exceeds what a Junior/Mid role requires. However, the fit is undermined by two structural blockers: the candidate is operating at Staff/Senior level, making the scope and likely compensation of this role a poor match, and their current base in Lagos conflicts directly with the high on-site presence requirement. The absence of explicit React, NestJS, and PostgreSQL experience is a secondary concern given the overall depth, but it does mean there is a ramp-up period even on the core stack.
